name: Problem Not Validated
description: Pain is mentioned, but no specific problem with measurable business impact has been established
observable_condition: Buyer confirms pain or interest but has not described a specific problem with measurable impact or consequence
trigger_input_conditions: Pain field populated AND Measurable Impact field empty OR user states no measurable business impact if problem is not solved
calibration_note: HIGH = buyer confirms no measurable impact; LOW = impact mentioned but not quantified

name: Outcomes Unclear or Misaligned
description: Buyer has not defined a clear future state or success outcome tied to the initiative
observable_condition: Buyer discusses features or capabilities but has not described desired future outcomes or success criteria
trigger_input_conditions: Desired Outcomes field empty OR buyer discusses solution capabilities without defining future business outcomes
calibration_note: HIGH = buyer discusses features only with no outcomes; LOW = outcomes mentioned but vague

name: Buyer Objections Surfacing Early
description: Buyer raises objections before the case for change and differentiation are established
observable_condition: Buyer raises objections about priority, approach, or price before desired outcomes or the case for change are validated
trigger_input_conditions: Buyer raises objection related to price, priority, or approach AND Desired Outcomes field empty AND Measurable Impact field empty
calibration_note: HIGH = objections raised before case for change; LOW = minor pushback noted

name: No Differentiated Decision Criteria
description: Buyer’s evaluation criteria do not reflect your differentiated strengths
observable_condition: Decision criteria are stated, but none uniquely favor your differentiated strengths or outcomes
trigger_input_conditions: Competitive Landscape indicates multiple vendors AND Desired Outcomes field populated AND Measurable Impact field populated AND buyer language does not reference differentiated strengths
calibration_note: HIGH = criteria actively favor competitor; LOW = criteria are generic

name: No Named or Active Champion
description: No stakeholder is actively advocating, coaching, or driving the deal internally
observable_condition: No stakeholder is providing internal insight, introducing others, or taking actions to advance the decision
trigger_input_conditions: Champion Status field empty OR Champion Status indicates passive or neutral behavior
calibration_note: HIGH = no stakeholder takes any internal action; LOW = passive supporter identified

name: Single-Threaded Contact
description: Engagement is limited to a single stakeholder with no consensus-building motion
observable_condition: Only one stakeholder is actively engaged in meetings or communications
trigger_input_conditions: Stakeholder Coverage = Single stakeholder
calibration_note: HIGH = only one person in all communications; LOW = second contact mentioned but not engaged

name: Activity Without Progress
description: Deal activity is occurring, but qualification, alignment, or stage advancement is not improving
observable_condition: Two or more interactions occur with no new stakeholders, no new qualification data, and no stage progression
trigger_input_conditions: Recent Interaction Summary indicates multiple interactions AND Stakeholder Coverage = Single stakeholder AND Stage unchanged
calibration_note: HIGH = 3+ interactions with no advancement; LOW = 2 interactions with minimal progress

name: Competition Gaining Mindshare
description: Competitor influence is shaping buyer thinking, language, or evaluation direction
observable_condition: Buyer references a competitor as the default or preferred option, or requests evaluation steps aligned to the competitor’s approach
trigger_input_conditions: Competitive Landscape indicates active competitor AND buyer language reflects competitor preference or evaluation alignment
calibration_note: HIGH = buyer uses competitor language/frameworks; LOW = competitor mentioned in passing

name: No EB Validation
description: Economic Buyer is not known, engaged, or aligned to the initiative
observable_condition: Economic Buyer is not identified, and support from any economic authority is unknown
trigger_input_conditions: Economic Buyer Identified = No OR Economic Buyer Engagement = None
calibration_note: HIGH = economic buyer unknown or unresponsive; LOW = EB identified but not yet engaged

name: Validation / Process Misalignment
description: Buyer’s preferred evaluation or decision steps do not align with your strengths
observable_condition: Buyer requests a validation or evaluation step that does not test the outcomes or capabilities your differentiation depends on
trigger_input_conditions: Decision Process defined AND buyer requests evaluation steps not aligned to differentiated strengths
calibration_note: HIGH = buyer evaluation tests competitor strengths; LOW = evaluation steps are generic

name: Slowdowns or Silence
description: Deal momentum drops as responsiveness and engagement decrease
observable_condition: Buyer response time slows materially, meetings are cancelled or delayed, or no next steps are agreed after an interaction
trigger_input_conditions: Recent Interaction Summary indicates delayed responses OR no upcoming meeting or next step recorded
calibration_note: HIGH = no response in 2+ weeks; LOW = response time increased but still communicating

name: New Stakeholder Appears Late
description: A new stakeholder enters late and reopens scope, priorities, or requirements
observable_condition: A new stakeholder is introduced after evaluation or validation has begun and introduces new requirements, objections, or decision criteria
trigger_input_conditions: Stage >= Mid AND Recent Interaction Summary indicates new stakeholder introduction
calibration_note: HIGH = new stakeholder reopens decided requirements; LOW = new stakeholder observing only

name: Conflict in Pricing or Terms
description: Commercial objections indicate weak value alignment or Economic Buyer commitment
observable_condition: Buyer challenges pricing or terms without confirming value metrics, success outcomes, or consensus sponsorship
trigger_input_conditions: Commercial Awareness = Discussed AND Measurable Impact field empty AND Desired Outcomes field empty
calibration_note: HIGH = buyer challenges price without acknowledging value; LOW = price sensitivity noted

name: Adoption Without Internal Ownership
description: Product usage is present but no individual is responsible for driving evaluation or expansion
observable_condition: Product usage is present, but no internal owner has been identified
trigger_input_conditions: Product Usage Presence not None AND Internal Owner Identified = No
calibration_note: HIGH = no identified owner despite active usage; LOW = informal owner but no mandate

name: Adoption Without Decision Formation
description: Product usage is present but has not formed into a structured buying process or initiative
observable_condition: Product usage is present, but no decision process, stakeholders, or commercial steps have been defined
trigger_input_conditions: Product Usage Presence not None AND Internal Owner Identified = Yes AND Commercial Awareness = None AND Decision Process empty
calibration_note: HIGH = usage exists with no buying process; LOW = early commercial discussions forming

name: Adoption With Negative User Experience
description: Product usage exists but is not delivering meaningful value to the user or business
observable_condition: Users are not relying on the product in their workflows or would not be impacted if it were removed
trigger_input_conditions: Product Usage Presence not None AND (Usage Trend = Declining OR Workflow Dependency = None OR Removal Impact = No impact)
calibration_note: HIGH = users would not notice removal; LOW = usage declining but still present

name: Champion Coaching & Influence
description: Champion actively coaches the seller and drives internal alignment
observable_condition: A stakeholder shares internal dynamics, introduces additional stakeholders, or guides next steps to advance the decision
trigger_input_conditions: Champion Status indicates active advocacy AND Recent Interaction Summary reflects stakeholder introductions or internal guidance
calibration_note: HIGH = champion introduces stakeholders and shares internal dynamics; LOW = champion is supportive but passive

name: Economic Buyer Engagement
description: Economic Buyer is directly engaged and aligned with the initiative
observable_condition: Economic Buyer participates directly in meetings or validates the initiative direction
trigger_input_conditions: Economic Buyer Identified = Yes AND Economic Buyer Engagement = Direct
calibration_note: HIGH = EB directly participates in meetings; LOW = EB delegates but is aware

name: Multi-Threading Momentum
description: New stakeholders are being introduced and consensus is expanding
observable_condition: Additional stakeholders are introduced and engage in problem, outcome, or decision discussions
trigger_input_conditions: Stakeholder Coverage = Multiple stakeholders OR Stakeholder Coverage = Cross-functional
calibration_note: HIGH = cross-functional stakeholders engaged; LOW = second contact recently introduced

name: Differentiated Validation Momentum
description: Buyer shapes evaluation steps around your strengths and acknowledges competitor weaknesses
observable_condition: Buyer proposes or accepts validation steps that highlight your differentiated capabilities
trigger_input_conditions: Decision Process defined AND Desired Outcomes field populated AND Measurable Impact field populated AND buyer validation aligns to differentiated strengths
calibration_note: HIGH = buyer proposes evaluation around your strengths; LOW = buyer accepts your suggested evaluation

name: Responsiveness Velocity
description: Buyer engagement accelerates, indicating growing urgency or alignment
observable_condition: Buyer initiates next steps, responds quickly, or increases meeting cadence
trigger_input_conditions: Recent Interaction Summary indicates rapid responses OR increased interaction frequency OR buyer-initiated next steps
calibration_note: HIGH = buyer initiates next steps unprompted; LOW = buyer responds faster than before

name: Usage Demonstrates Material Value
description: Product usage is delivering meaningful operational or business value to the user or organization
observable_condition: The product is relied on in workflows or its removal would negatively impact the business
trigger_input_conditions: Product Usage Presence not None AND (Workflow Dependency = Critical OR Removal Impact = Significant disruption)
calibration_note: HIGH = product removal would disrupt workflows; LOW = product used but not critical

name: Adoption Conversion Momentum
description: Product usage is beginning to translate into ownership, stakeholder alignment, and a structured buying process
observable_condition: Product usage is present, an internal owner is driving the initiative, and commercial or decision steps are forming
trigger_input_conditions: Product Usage Presence not None AND Internal Owner Identified = Yes AND Commercial Awareness not None AND Decision Process defined
calibration_note: HIGH = internal owner driving commercial process; LOW = owner identified but no commercial steps
